content.full_text:
December 21, 2001

June Rady, Mayor Pro Tem
City of Escondido
201 North Broadway
Escondido, CA 92025

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-177

Dear Ms. Rady:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of December 14, 2001, this letter will confirm that you have withdrawn your request for advice, as you have now purchased a home and, thus, your request for advice is moot. We thank you for your courtesies in this matter.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
